title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Direct Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Direct Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Direct Holdings Services! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Direct Holdings Services:
ICICI Direct Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct Holdings Services!
